expectations.text: Organizes output into the 5 canonical buckets (pain points, trigger moments, objections, transformations, standout language)
expectations.evidence: Organized by Core Insight/Headline Phrases/Themes/Voice Patterns/Ad Concepts — not the 5 canonical buckets

expectations.text: References scoring reviews 1-5 for quality before analysis
expectations.evidence: No 1-5 scoring — only a final 'Weakest Review' callout identifying Review #3 as skippable

expectations.text: Surfaces actual quotes from reviews (not just summary)
expectations.evidence: 6+ exact quotes including 'Not toned - strong', 'walk into my gym like I own it', 'stupid how proud I am'

expectations.text: Surfaces exact customer phrases as standout language (e.g. 'strong not toned', 'stupid how proud I am')
expectations.evidence: Headline-Ready Phrases section pulls 'Not toned - strong' and 'stupid how proud I am' explicitly

expectations.text: Names specific transformation moments (groceries in one trip, walking into gym like I own it)
expectations.evidence: Concept 3 The Gym Arc names weight-room-fear to 'walks in like she owns it'; groceries-in-one-trip surfaced as functional pride

expectations.text: Captures objections to what OTHER products do (postpartum framing, 'you got this girl', 25-year-old audience)
expectations.evidence: Theme 2 names postpartum/25/beginner framing; Words to AVOID lists 'You got this girl', 'bounce back', look-25-again
